title: Business Development Executive (MNC/ Transport allowance)
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

1. Sales Generation:

- Prospect and identify potential clients through various means such as cold calling, networking, and industry research.
- Develop and maintain a strong sales pipeline to meet or exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
- Conduct product presentations and demonstrations to potential clients.

2. Client Relationship Management:

- Build and maintain strong and positive customer relationships.
- Understand customer needs, provide customized solutions, and effectively communicate the value proposition of our printing and IT services.
- Address customer inquiries and concerns promptly and professionally.

3. Market Research and Analysis:

- Stay updated on industry trends, market developments, and competitor activities.
- Analyse market data to identify new opportunities and adapt sales strategies accordingly.

4. Quotation and Proposal Preparation:

- Prepare accurate and competitive price quotations and proposals for clients.
- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure timely delivery and quality of products and services.

5. Sales Reporting:

- Maintain detailed records of sales activities, customer interactions, and sales-related opportunities in our CRM system.
- Provide regular sales reports and forecasts to the sales manager.


Job Requirement

1. Minimum Diploma or Degree in any discipline

2. Sales experience in IT office automation or similar industry is an advantage


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref71@trustrecruit.com.sg


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.


Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 19C9950

EA Personnel: Lee Jia Xiang

EA Personnel Reg No: R25158171

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
postedCompany.name: TRUST RECRUIT PTE. LTD.
